use_cases: Add a playful, animated star effect to favorite or rating buttons
Create engaging call-to-action buttons with hover animations
Add visual delight to interactive bookmark or like actions
Enhance product ratings with animated star feedback
ai_summary: An interactive button component featuring animated star particles that burst outward with a glowing effect on hover. The button uses a warm peach color palette with smooth cubic-bezier transitions and a scale-down effect on click. Designed to add visual delight and engagement to CTAs, ratings, or favorites functionality.
